creator: johan@300.nl
text:
So far I haven't seen this panic on my machine anymore, but we are running a few more patches that are in upstream stable/10. (https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=282679 which was causing us all sorts of trouble, in general the amount of panics we have seen since this patch has greatly reduced)

What kind of machine are you running on which you received the panic? Could this be a virtual machine by any chance?
